The San Francisco Standard reported: 'Maybe we should call ICE on you': Passenger describes United confrontation at SFO. San Francisco Chronicle reported: United employee at SFO threatens to call ICE on Mexican American passenger: 'You don't act like a citizen'. SFist reported: United Airlines Employee at SFO Tells Customer 'Maybe We Should Call ICE On You'. NBC Bay Area reported: United Airlines worker threatens to call ICE on Bay Area family at SFO.
